data.body:
[Event Preview]

Sensei, 'The Senses Descend' event is coming back soon!

If you missed it before, this is your chance to see it!

![HayaseYuuka](https://kivo.wiki/files/4417/QtrMflzzbNHBsBrZyCeaW93QBu57hbvV.jpg)
